description: Video conferencing SDKs, WebRTC infrastructure, live streaming, and real-time chat infrastructure for building communication features into apps.

entries.name: Daily.co
entries.summary: WebRTC video/audio API for embedding live calls into apps, with prebuilt UI or fully custom SDKs.

entries.name: Twilio Video
entries.summary: Programmable video API for building group or 1:1 video experiences, part of the broader Twilio platform.
entries.freeTier: Free trial credit for new accounts.

entries.name: Agora
entries.summary: Real-time engagement platform (voice, video, live streaming, chat) used widely in social and gaming apps.
entries.freeTier: 10,000 free minutes/month across most use cases.

entries.name: Stream (GetStream.io)
entries.summary: Chat and activity feed APIs/SDKs for building in-app messaging and social feeds quickly.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for small projects (limited monthly active users).
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans billed per MAU beyond free tier.

entries.name: PubNub
entries.summary: Real-time messaging infrastructure (pub/sub) for chat, IoT, and live data sync use cases.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with 200 monthly active users included.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans billed per MAU beyond free tier.

entries.name: Mux
entries.summary: Video API for encoding, storing, and streaming on-demand and live video at scale.
entries.freeTier: Small free credit for new accounts; ongoing usage is metered.

entries.name: Jitsi Meet
entries.summary: Open-source video conferencing platform; self-host for free or use the public meet.jit.si instance.
entries.freeTier: Completely free self-hosted; public instance free with no account required.

entries.name: LiveKit
entries.summary: Open-source WebRTC infrastructure (SFU) for building real-time video/audio/data apps, self-hostable or managed Cloud.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted fully free; LiveKit Cloud free tier includes limited monthly participant-minutes.
entries.paidFrom: Cloud Scale plan billed on usage.
